body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**The Markov blanket trick: On the scope of the free energy principle and active inference.**. Phys Life Rev.. PMID: 34563472. DOI: 10.1016/j.plrev.2021.09.001. The free energy principle (FEP) has been presented as aunified brain theory, as ageneral principle for the self-organization of biological systems, and most recently as aprinciple for atheory of every thing. Additionally, active inference has been proposed as the process theory entailed by FEP that is able to model the full range of biological and cognitive events.
